title: User Registration
description: Users should be able to create an account with email and password
acceptanceCriteria: Password must be at least 8 characters
Confirmation email is sent after registration
User is redirected to dashboard after signup

title: Product Search
description: Users can search for products by name, category, or price range
acceptanceCriteria: Search results update as user types

title: Shopping Cart
description: Users can add, remove, and update quantities in their cart
acceptanceCriteria: Adding product updates cart badge count
Quantity can be increased or decreased
Removing last item empties the cart
